notes: Full Thai street food menu captured across small plates, grilled items, fried items, salads, soups, rice/noodle bowls, curries, sides, and desserts. No prices were listed anywhere in the raw text, so all price_cents are null. Duplicate MUSSAMUN and KANA MOO GROB entries appear in source text — retained once each.
